summary: Backend API testing completed for The Dabba Kitchen Portal - all 19 tests passed. Verified: plan_type field in plans CRUD (daily/weekly/yearly), preparation-list with new fields (plan_type, total_skips, recent_skips, last_skip_date, subscription_start), roti default=6, dal calculation using 340g, driver-locations endpoint, and both health endpoints.

minor.issue: Existing plans have null plan_type (legacy data before field was added). New plans correctly get plan_type. Code handles this with default 'weekly'.

critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionPlanData model correctly includes plan_type field with default 'weekly' and options: daily/weekly/yearly
preparation-list endpoint correctly returns: plan_type, total_skips, recent_skips, last_skip_date, subscription_start for each customer
Roti default changed from 4 to 6 in preparation-list (verified: default_items['roti'] = 6)
Dal calculation correctly uses 340g (12oz) per portion (verified: total_dal_grams = portions * 340)
New /kitchen/driver-locations endpoint correctly returns driver tracking data with fields: driver_id, driver_name, phone, latitude, longitude, last_updated, active_deliveries, is_online
Root /health endpoint added for Render deployment (works on backend port 8001, frontend intercepts on public URL)
/api/health endpoint still working with database connectivity check
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs fully tested. Key findings: 1) preparation-list returns 14 customers with roti=6 default, dal=340g calc, plan_type/skip fields present, 2) driver-locations returns 6 drivers (1 online with coordinates), 3) plans CRUD works with plan_type field (existing plans have null plan_type - handled with default), 4) Root /health works on localhost:8001 but frontend intercepts on public URL (expected for Expo app).

verified_features.preparation_list_fields: PASS - Returns plan_type, total_skips, recent_skips, last_skip_date, subscription_start
verified_features.driver_locations_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/kitchen/driver-locations returns driver tracking data
